title: Customizable Pearl Cooldown
description: Change every ender pearl's use cooldown
body:
This datapack allows you to make the Ender Pearl's cooldown longer.

## How to use
Enter **/function pearl_cooldown:config**

You can now use the slider to enter the amount of time (in seconds) that you want the pearl cooldown to be.

_(Note: The cooldown can only be from 1 to 60 seconds)_
